sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ «مَقَامَاتُ» الْبَدِيعِ الهَمَذَانِيِّ بِلُغَتِهَا الإِبْدَاعِيَّةِ الْفَائِقَةِ وَشَخْصِيَّتِهَا الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ الْمُحْتَالَةِ الَّتِي تُضَمِّنُ فِي خِطَابِهَا حِكَمًا إِنْسَانِيَّةً عَمِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: "Maqame" al-Badiego al-Hamadanija odlikuju se izvanrednim kreativnim jezikom i glavnim likom prevaranta koji u svom diskursu krije duboke humanističke mudrosti.
sentences.translationEn: The Maqamat of al-Badi al-Hamadhani are distinguished by their superlative creative language and their trickster protagonist who embeds deep humanistic wisdom within their discourse.
